title: Operate vehicles
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate vehicles demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare vehicle for use

pcs.text: Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying and reporting potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risk
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying and reporting potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying and reporting potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risk.

pcs.text: Source and interpret relevant vehicle operation and maintenance manual and observe manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and interpret relevant vehicle operation and maintenance manual and observe manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and interpret relevant vehicle operation and maintenance manual and observe manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Select and use personal protective equipment and safety equipment applicable to operating the vehicle
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and use personal protective equipment and safety equipment applicable to operating the vehicle?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and use personal protective equipment and safety equipment applicable to operating the vehicle.

pcs.text: Carry out vehicle routine pre-operational checks and maintenance of vehicle prior to use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out vehicle routine pre-operational checks and maintenance of vehicle prior to use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out vehicle routine pre-operational checks and maintenance of vehicle prior to use.

pcs.text: Identify faults or malfunctions and report to supervisor for repair
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify faults or malfunctions and report to supervisor for repair?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify faults or malfunctions and report to supervisor for repair.

pcs.text: Secure loads according to vehicle operation manual and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Secure loads according to vehicle operation manual and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Secure loads according to vehicle operation manual and manufacturer instructions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare vehicle for use

elements.title: Drive vehicle

pcs.text: Carry out pre-start, and start up procedures according to workplace health and safety guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out pre-start, and start up procedures according to workplace health and safety guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pre-start, and start up procedures according to workplace health and safety guidelines.

pcs.text: Drive vehicle in a safe and controlled manner
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Drive vehicle in a safe and controlled manner?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Drive vehicle in a safe and controlled manner.

pcs.text: Identify and anticipate driving hazards during vehicle operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and anticipate driving hazards during vehicle operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and anticipate driving hazards during vehicle operation.

pcs.text: Apply safe and defensive driving techniques for controlling hazards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply safe and defensive driving techniques for controlling hazards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply safe and defensive driving techniques for controlling hazards.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with vehicle operation and minimise impact
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with vehicle operation and minimise impact?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with vehicle operation and minimise impact.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Drive vehicle

elements.title: Complete vehicle operation

pcs.text: Park vehicle and conduct shut down according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Park vehicle and conduct shut down according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Park vehicle and conduct shut down according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Perform routine operational servicing and minor maintenance according to vehicle operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform routine operational servicing and minor maintenance according to vehicle operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform routine operational servicing and minor maintenance according to vehicle operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Identify and report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage to supervisor.

pcs.text: Clean, decontaminate, secure and store vehicle
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, decontaminate, secure and store vehicle?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, decontaminate, secure and store vehicle.

pcs.text: Remove and store keys according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove and store keys according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove and store keys according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain vehicle use records in required format
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain vehicle use records in required format?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain vehicle use records in required format.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete vehicle operation

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
